name: chrome-background
description: Stop Google Chrome from running in the background.

actions.comment: Close all Chrome processes, including background tabs/apps living in the tray

actions.name: BackgroundModeEnabled
actions.comment: Policy: Chrome must NOT keep background apps alive after the window is closed

actions.name: GoogleChromeAutoLaunch_*
actions.comment: Remove Chrome's per-user auto-launch on logon (name has a per-install hash suffix)

actions.name: gupdate
actions.comment: Google Update service (optional; disabling pauses Chrome auto-updates)

actions.name: GoogleUpdateTaskMachine*
actions.comment: Disable (not delete) the Google updater tasks that re-spawn background processes
